parameters.jsCode: const input=$json; if(!input.organization_id||!input.integration_id||!input.event_id||!input.workflow_name) throw new Error('Incomplete alert route envelope'); const status=String(input.connection_health??'unknown'); if(input.enabled!==true||status!=='healthy') return [{json:{...input,route_status:'unhealthy',fallback_integration_id:input.fallback_integration_id??null,alert_dedupe_key:`${input.event_id}:final-alert`}}]; return [{json:{...input,route_status:'ready',alert_dedupe_key:`${input.event_id}:final-alert`}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { alert_dedupe_key: $json.alert_dedupe_key, organization_id: $json.organization_id, integration_id: $json.integration_id, provider: $json.provider, event_type: 'workflow_failure', workflow_name: $json.workflow_name, event_id: $json.event_id, status: $json.status, records_processed: $json.records_processed ?? 0, records_failed: $json.records_failed ?? 0, summary: String($json.error_message ?? 'Workflow failed').slice(0, 500), route_status: $json.route_status } }}
